user.title: HA Overwatch
user.description:
Connect to the HA Overwatch add-on running on this instance.

Make sure the HA Overwatch add-on is installed and running before continuing.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to HA Overwatch add-on. Make sure it is installed and running.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA Overwatch add-on logs.
